name: Traveling Merchant
title: Goods & Curiosities of the Wandering Roads
greeting: Ahh — a settlement! I've been on the road three days and this is the most promising thing I've seen. I have something for you: a Mystery Seed, pulled from the forests south of the Amber River. Rare thing. Ten gold and it's yours.

choices.label: Buy the Mystery Seed
choices.response: Excellent taste. Plant it somewhere with good light — these seeds have opinions about that. Safe travels, friend. I'll find my way back through here eventually.

choices.label: Not today
choices.response: No hard feelings. The road goes on. Perhaps next time.

name: Envoy of the Great Oak
title: Diplomat · Great Oak Kingdom
greeting: The Great Oak Kingdom sends their regards. Our council has observed your settlement with genuine interest — you've built something worth noticing. We believe an alliance would serve us both well. Will you sign a peace treaty with the Great Oak? Your trade routes would carry our blessing.

choices.label: Sign the treaty
choices.response: Wonderful. The Great Oak remembers its allies. You will find our trade routes generous and our memory long. This is the beginning of something good.

choices.label: Respectfully decline
choices.response: Understood. The council respects careful consideration. The invitation remains open should your position change. Safe travels.

name: Krag of the Northern Clans
title: Scout · Northern Clan Riders
greeting: Long road from the northern ridges. Your fires looked warm from the pass. The clans have been watching this place — some say it's worth knowing. I say it's worth finding out. You willing to share a meal? We pay our debts.

choices.label: Offer hospitality (5g)
choices.response: Good. That's good. The clans remember hospitality — carries more weight than gold where we're from. You've made a solid friend today.

choices.label: Turn them away
choices.response: No offense taken. The road goes both ways. We'll find warmth elsewhere.
